items.summary: Add a backend endpoint that accepts an uploaded file (PDF or image encoded as binary/base64), stores the raw file data per principal, and returns a stable reference ID for the uploaded asset.

Add a backend OCR processing endpoint that takes a stored file reference ID, performs text extraction on the file content, and returns structured fields: detected date, test names, and test result values parsed from the extracted text.

Add an 'Upload Record' option to the Add Record page UI. The upload flow must allow the user to select or drag-and-drop a PDF or image file, display a preview or filename confirmation, trigger OCR extraction on the uploaded file, and pre-populate the medical record form fields (date, category, and metric values) with the extracted data for user review and correction before submission.

Add a `listUploadedFiles` backend endpoint that returns metadata (file ID, upload timestamp, MIME type) for all files uploaded by the calling principal, and a `deleteUploadedFile` endpoint to remove a file by ID.
